name: Black Widowling

attacks.name: Bite
attacks.tell: It lunges with a short bite once it gets close.
attacks.howToAvoid: Block it or keep distance before it closes the angle.
attacks.notes: The base damage is small, but venom makes ignoring them expensive.

attacks.name: Jump
attacks.tell: It crouches and then jumps directly at the player's position.
attacks.howToAvoid: Move sideways or block when it reaches your body.
attacks.notes: This is the move that makes their swarm behavior most oppressive.

description: A venomous black widow offspring that patrols near its mother's dens. Alone it is manageable, but several together become a nasty nuisance very quickly.
behavior: It moves in clusters and may sleep in sync with the rest of the brood. It shares the standard spiderling attack pattern, but its hits apply venom instead of ordinary poison.
interactionWithPlayer: It is aggressive on sight and can also burst out of certain upper-yard web sacs. When several surround you, venom stacks fast and forces you to clear them before focusing the adult.
interactionWithCreatures: It stays passive toward black widows and is otherwise mostly neutral until provoked.
strategy: Spicy is the straightforward answer. Fresh, stabbing, and generic all perform poorly here, so area damage or quick stagger-heavy attacks are the most efficient way to stop the swarm before it closes in.
respawnInfo: 3 days by default. In the Undershed it takes 2 days, and in the Black Widow Cave it takes 7 days.
specialTraits: Its attacks apply venom, which lasts longer than regular poison and bypasses Mithridatism.
